title: Doc's Whimscape Additions - Even More Delight
description: An unofficial add-on for Whimscape for Farmer's Delight Addons!
body:
![A line of six icons depicting different mods included. In order they are: a wooden crate with apples, a slice of pumpkin pie, a slive of bread, a guardian-shaped bowl with soup, a dark oak cabinet, and a purple yam/ube.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99904de258bd6c7c25c5f562f3d1908099d7058f.png) **Whimscape - now with even more delight!**
This Whimscape add-on is another part of my Whimscape Additions project. This add-on adds to the already existing farmer's delight compatability of Whimscape with textures for a handful of add-ons for the mod. This add-on will continue to be updated as more Farmer's Delight addons are ported to 1.21. Currently, this add-on supports the following; - Crate Delight - Pumpkin Pie Delight - More Delight - Ocean's Delight - Storage Delight - Ube's Delight
[![A horizontally long, light blue button with the words "Download Whimscape" on it, followed by an arrow pointing toa black and purple portal. On the left side of the button is a square icon depicting a large white "W" with a grassy scene behind it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37f9d79f3df9fa56ce348ccaed361b70dc9d365f.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape) Check out my other addons! [![A horizontally long, copper orange button with the words "Friends + Foes Add-on" on it, followed by an arrow pointing to a black and purple portal. On the left side of the button is a square icon depicting a large white "W" with a coppper orange metal background..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40cfaba3267bd90207c0c00ef26cee6804de9198.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/docs-whimscape-additions-friends-and-foes)
